entities.name: PEA LEAF ROLL VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes stunt in chickpea and has a high natural incidence in Hissar, India

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop being screened for resistance to pea leaf roll virus

entities.name: STUNT
entities.description: A growth inhibition symptom caused by pea leaf roll virus in chickpea

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process used to identify chickpea lines with low infection rates

entities.name: HISSAR, INDIA
entities.description: The site where the screening for pea leaf roll virus resistance was conducted

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The state of being infected by the pea leaf roll virus
